function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request as written because one of the five specified OCR targets does not exist: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_13__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md` (leading underscore). I made no edits. Please confirm whether you meant the existing file without the underscore so I can proceed.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox-processing guidance, when task is not doable, do not leave partial edits; keep inbox and ask for clarification. Also avoid partial completion when one required listed file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The request explicitly lists five files in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md. Four exist and were read, but the fifth path with a leading underscore is missing from 50_finance/purchases. Under process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update, partial processing is not allowed when the routed task cannot be fully completed.
